Package index

Computation of Diversity Measures

diversity.calc()
Compute Diversity Measures
berger_parker() berger_parker_reciprocal() simpson() gini_simpson() simpson_max() simpson_reciprocal() simpson_relative() simpson_evenness() shannon() shannon_max() shannon_relative() shannon_ens() mcintosh_diversity() mcintosh_evenness() smith_wilson() heip_evenness() margalef_index() menhinick_index() brillouin_index() hill_number() renyi_entropy() tsallis_entropy() hill_evenness()
Diversity Index Functions

Comparison of Diversity Measures

diversity.compare()
Compare Diversity Measures
perm.test.global() perm.test.pairwise()
Permutation Tests
bootstrap.ci()
Bootstrap Confidence Intervals
diversity.profile()
Generate Diversity Profiles for Parametric Indices
